creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
Start firefox.  Try to watch a video.  Watch totem crash firefox.

Fix: 

** Message: NP_Initialize
** Message: NP_Initialize succeeded
** Message: totemPlugin ctor [0x242f360]
** Message: Init mimetype 'video/x-ms-wmv' mode 2
** Message: Base URI is 'http://content.ftvgirls.com/lesliehd3.wmv'
** Message: Real mimetype for 'video/x-ms-wmv' is 'video/x-ms-wmv'
argv[0] type video/x-ms-wmv
argv[1] src http://content.ftvgirls.com/lesliehd3.wmv
argv[2] name plugin
argv[3] height 100%
argv[4] width 100%
